setBonus: 3 of Set: Marilith Strike — Whenever you hit an enemy with a critical attack, the damage the enemy takes will be increased by 1% for 5 seconds. This can stack up to 5 times.

setBonus: 3 of Set: Rune of the Underdark — When you use a Daily power, create a rune on the ground for 6 sec, empowering any ally who stands upon it with 5% Accuracy, 5% Critical Strike, and increases outgoing damage by 5%. Does not stack with other Runes of the Underdark.
